products.name: Manual Triggering Device
products.descriptor: Remote manual trigger for DRS parachutes; EU (868 MHz) and non-EU (915 MHz) variants, 2000 m range

evidence.snippet:
Manual Triggering Device
========================
##### Our manual triggering device is used to manually deploy the DRS parachute.
Manual Triggering Device
------------------------
Available in EU and non-EU version. It has a tested range of 2000 meters.

unresolved_questions: All DRS product spec sheets are gated behind a contact form — technical details (parachute area, deployment altitude, etc.) are not publicly disclosed in the corpus.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims found anywhere in the corpus; all products default to unknown.

Individual product pages for DRS-X6, DRS-X8, DRS-PRISM Lite, DRS-PRISM Sky, DRS-VELOS V3, and DRS-Heavy Lift were skipped (page_class=other, skipped_class_budget) — product details for these come only from the products listing page.
DRS-Heavy Lift readiness is inferred as engineering_services from 'variable' dimensions on the listing page; dedicated page may clarify whether standard configurations exist.
DRS-VTOL product page (/drs-vtol/) may differ from the fetched VTOL/Fixed-Wing overview page (resource-0018) — dedicated page could confirm or refine readiness classification.
